# Code of Conduct

## The short version

Be respectful. Help each other out. Don't be a jerk.

## Expected behaviour

- Use welcoming and inclusive language
- Be respectful of different viewpoints and experience levels
- Accept constructive criticism gracefully
- Focus on what's best for the community and the project
- Show empathy toward other community members

## Unacceptable behaviour

- Harassment, insults, or derogatory comments in any form
- Publishing others' private information without permission
- Trolling, deliberate disruption of discussions
- Any conduct that would be considered inappropriate in a professional setting

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to all project spaces — GitHub issues, pull requests, discussions, and any other community channels associated with delamain-sp-bridge.

## Enforcement

Instances of unacceptable behaviour may be reported by opening a private contact with the maintainer via GitHub. All reports will be reviewed and investigated and will result in a response appropriate to the circumstances. Maintainers are obligated to maintain confidentiality with regard to the reporter.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 2.1.
